rationale.D1: Confirmed abstract base class per subsystem (AgitatorS, TurretS, FlyWheelS, etc.) with Real + None (null-object) swappable variants across all mechanisms; vendor types (CTRE Phoenix6) confirmed inside Real impls only; no interface+IOSim pattern and no Sim variant for mechanisms (except SimODVision), so discounted from D1=3.
rationale.D2: Confirmed RobotStates inner class coordinates cross-subsystem predicates (isShootReady, isTurretStowed) and AutoCommands encapsulates multi-subsystem command sequences; no centralized Superstructure with goal-request API or guarded state transitions — coordination is command-composition + boolean flags, which anchors at L2.
rationale.D3: Confirmed simulationPeriodic() and simIterate() in 8+ Real subsystems (flywheel, turret, intakepivot, indexer, spindexer, hood, climbpivot, climbextension) plus SimODVision and a RobotVisualizer; sim is mechanism-level physics (via YAMS) but not full-robot drivetrain physics sim, so scored between L2 and L3.
rationale.D4: No test files found anywhere in src/test, no CI workflow files; D4=0.
rationale.D5: Confirmed Epilogue @Logged on Robot.java and bound via Epilogue.bind(this); @Logged annotations on abstract subsystem methods (agitator, flywheel, turret, intakepivot, etc.); file backend is commented out so logs go to NetworkTables only; @Logged annotations in RobotContainer are mostly commented out, limiting subsystem coverage — scores L2 (structured lightweight logging, active but partial).
rationale.D6: Confirmed Choreo .traj files actively loaded via factory.trajectoryCmd(ChoreoTraj.R_Sweep.name()) in Autos.java; both Choreo trajectories and on-the-fly AutoAlign pose-driving used in competition autos; no PathPlanner, but Choreo + reactive pose alignment qualifies as L3.
rationale.D7: Confirmed 4 Limelights with MegaTag2 AprilTag pose estimation, std-dev tuning formula (distance^2/tagCount^2 coefficients), addVisionMeasurement called with custom std-devs; AprilTagVision abstract class with Real+None; game-piece object detection with SimODVision variant; multi-camera fusion is real but no dedicated RobotState class with TimeInterpolatableBuffer, so discounted from L4.
rationale.D8: Confirmed 5 seasons tracked, separate NOMADBase library repo present; no README beyond WPILib license in the season repo, no CI workflows, no spotless/checkstyle in build.gradle; library is a separate repo but not consumed as a versioned dependency — scores between L2 (library exists, multi-season) and L3 (no CI).
